summary: Iteration 91: Creator Dashboard - All features working correctly. Backend APIs properly restrict access to creator user only (kyndsmiles@gmail.com). Non-creator users get 403 on all /api/creator/* endpoints. Frontend shows Creator badge and Creator Studio link only for admin users. Dashboard displays all 5 tabs (Overview, Feedback, Comments, Users, Popular) with real data from MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creator Dashboard fully tested. Key data-testids: creator-dashboard, creator-tab-overview, creator-tab-feedback, creator-tab-comments, creator-tab-users, creator-tab-features, creator-overview, creator-feedback-tab, creator-comments-tab, creator-users-tab, creator-features-tab, creator-stat-total-users, creator-stat-active-today, creator-stat-active-month, creator-stat-app-installs, creator-stat-mood-logs, creator-stat-feedback, nav-credits-badge (shows 'Creator' for admin), nav-creator-link (in profile dropdown for admin only).

creator_access_control.details: All /api/creator/* endpoints return 403 for non-creator users. Only kyndsmiles@gmail.com has access.

creator_overview_api.details: GET /api/creator/overview returns all stats: total_users, active_today, active_week, active_month, new_users_week, total_installs, total_feedback, new_feedback, in_review_feedback, resolved_feedback, total_comments, total_moods, total_journals, total_sessions

creator_popular_features_api.details: GET /api/creator/popular-features returns list of pages with visit counts

creator_feedback_api.details: GET /api/creator/feedback returns all feedback items. PUT /api/creator/feedback/{id}/status updates status (new, in_review, resolved, dismissed)

creator_comments_api.details: GET /api/creator/comments returns all comments. DELETE /api/creator/comments/{id} deletes a comment

creator_recent_users_api.details: GET /api/creator/recent-users returns user list without passwords

app_install_tracking.details: POST /api/app-install tracks PWA install event (requires auth)

creator_dashboard_ui.details: Creator Dashboard page loads at /creator with Overview tab showing stat cards (Total Users, Active Today, Active Month, App Installs, Mood Logs, Feedback), Daily Active Users chart, and Top Features by Usage

creator_nav_badge.details: Navigation shows 'Creator' badge in credits area for admin user. Non-admin users see their credit balance instead.

creator_studio_link.details: Creator Studio link appears in profile dropdown only for admin users

creator_dashboard_tabs.details: All 5 tabs work: Overview, Feedback (with count), Comments, Users, Popular

non_creator_access_denied.details: Non-creator users navigating to /creator see 'Creator access only' error with shield icon and 'Back to Dashboard' link
